sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after clicking magenta dot
print("Current small objects:")
for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] <= 10:
        b = n['boundary'][0]
        print(f"  color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} pos={b}")

# Check if the clicked dot changed
if last_transition:
    before_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
    after_nodes = {n['hash']: n for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']}
    print(f"\nBefore: {len(before_nodes)} nodes, After: {len(after_nodes)} nodes")
    
    # Find new or changed nodes
    for n in current_frame.segmentation['nodes']:
        if n['pixels'] <= 10 and n['hash'] not in before_nodes:
            print(f"  NEW: color={n['color']} pos={n['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
